titleStmt.title: SII 18.74: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 74. (B.K. No. 172 of 1933-34.) KĀKHAṆḌKI, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Bhuvanaikamalladēva, is dated in Śaka 991, Saumya, Pushya śu. Navami, Thursday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1069, December 24, Thursday, f.d.t. ·19.

It states that Kannaḍa-sandhivigrahi, Daṇḍanāyaka Madhuvarasa, described as Chālukya-rājy-ābhyudaya-kāraṇa (the cause of the prosperity of the Chālukyarule), made a grant of land, garden and oil-mills for worship and offerings to god Siddhēs11varadēva of the agrahāra Kākaṇḍige.
The king is stated to have been ruling from the standing camp (nelevīḍu) of Saṅkanakeṟeyūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ
satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhuva
naykamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛ
ddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salu
ttaṁ saṁkanakeṟeyūra nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁka
thāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire sakavarṣa 991ne
ya saumyasaṁvatsarada puṣya suddha navami bṛha
svativāradaṁdina Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntiya
parvvadaṁdu Uttamamagrahāraṁ kākaṇḍigeya si
ddhēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ snānanivēdyakkamendu
© svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsandhivi
grahādhiphati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ vibudha
varadāyakaṁ nuḍidaṁte gaṇḍaṁ śatrukuḷakāḷadaṇḍaṁ pra
tipaṁnamandaraṁ vāṇasānvayaphurandaraṁ ripughaṭekē
sari duṣṭaśiraḥkarttari cōḷaghaṭepaḍisavaṇaṁ ja
yalakṣmīramaṇaṁ vīrāṁganāvāsaṁ vīsaḷaraṁkusanammana ga
ndhavāraṇaṁ cāḷukyarājyābhyudayakāraṇaṁ nāmādi samasta
prasastisahitaṁ śrīmatkannaḍasandhivigrahi daṇḍanāyakaṁ
madhuvarasaru Aḷiya saṁjaṇana vrittiya haḷḷiya dāriyiṁ
paḍuvaṇasthaḷadalu haṁgada kōlaloṁbhattu mattarkkeyyaṁ bēḍi koṁḍu
mattariṁge salike nibandhadaruvaṇamāgi biṭṭa mattar 9 tōṁ
ṭa 1 gāṇa 2 Ī dharmmamaṁ tiguḷagēriya mahājanaṁgaḷu tāve
dātārarāgi nidēdyamuṁ kṣīrasnānakkeraḍu kavileyumaṁ kunda
līyade naḍeyisi mikkartthamaṁ gandhadhūpadīpacaitrapavitraṁ moda
lāgiyucitaṁ brayaṁgaḷaṁ māḍuvar . Ī śāsanadalu bareda vri
ttige sthānapatigaḷoḍeyarallaru . Intī . dharmmamanūroḍeyaruṁ
Innūrvvaruṁ rakṣisuvaru © sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nripāṇāṁ kālē kālē
pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānyētāṁ bhāgināṁ pārtthivēṁdrā bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rā
mabhadra . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ va yō haraṁti vasuṁdharāṁ śaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . Iṁntī dharmmamanāvanōrvvanaḷidaḍaṁ vārāṇāsiya
gurukṣētrada kavileyanaḷida pātakanakku . ©
Digital edition of SII 18.74 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
